response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is an experienced full-stack and backend software engineer with strengths in web platforms, TypeScript/Node.js, and developer tooling, but has zero demonstrated experience in any of the core competencies this role demands: SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, GPU or AI accelerator architecture, SIMD/MIMD systems, or deep-learning workload performance analysis at the silicon level. The closest signal — low-latency async I/O work at Sociomantic — is a software-layer optimization, not hardware performance architecture. The role operates at the intersection of chip design and ML infrastructure; the candidate operates entirely in application and platform software.
strengths: Demonstrated low-latency systems thinking (async I/O, fiber-based concurrency, high-throughput microservices at Sociomantic)
Breadth across stack including embedded systems exposure at Altom and National Instruments (C/C++ component work)
Active open-source contributor and community educator, suggesting strong communication skills for cross-functional principal-level work
concerns: No SoC, IP modeling, or any chip/hardware design experience whatsoever
No background in GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD, or AI accelerator performance analysis — all preferred or required qualifications
Deep-learning involvement is limited to software-layer AI-agent tooling (MCP frameworks), not training/inference optimization at the hardware or model-execution level

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or GPU architecture background
